title: Phase 8 — Volle Autonomie
description: AI-Provider-Service (per-Agent-Rolle, inkl. GitHub Models), Conductor-Orchestrator, Reviewer-Agent, Governance-Levels (manual/assisted/auto), GitLab + GitHub Webhook Consumer, GitHub Actions Agent, GitHub Projects V2 Sync, MCP Bridge/Gateway (Meta-MCP), 3D Nexus Grid, Worker-Endpoint-Pool. Kein Architekturbruch.
definition_of_done: Conductor dispatcht Agenten autonom, Reviewer-Agent prüft Task-Ergebnisse, Governance-Levels (manual/assisted/auto) konfigurierbar, AI-Provider per Agent-Rolle wählbar (inkl. GitHub Models), GitHub Webhooks ingestiert, GitHub Projects V2 bidirektional synced, MCP Bridge proxied externe Tools (GitHub/GitLab MCP) mit RBAC+Audit, 3D Nexus Grid rendert.
